title: Junior SEO Specialist at Sugar Cosmetics

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Sugar Cosmetics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sugar Cosmetics! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sugar Cosmetics:
Sugar Cosmetics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics!
